channel.title: DAI Beauty | daiology.store
channel.description: Health & Beauty Tools — Premium skincare devices

item.g:title: BrightBeam Strips
item.g:description: ✨ Reveal a whiter, brighter smile in just 7 days — no pain, all glow. BrightBeam Strips use powerful yet gentle whitening technology designed for fast, visible results without the sensitivity. These easy-to-use strips fit comfortably on your teeth, breaking down stains for a radiant, confident smile—all from the comfort of home. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 90% of users see noticeably whiter teeth within one week ⭐ Minimal to no sensitivity during and after treatment ✨ Over 10,000 smiles transformed and counting 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Professional-grade whitening that fits your lifestyle ✅ Lightweight strips for easy, mess-free application ✅ Fast-acting formula with visible results in less than a week ✅ Gentle on sensitive teeth and gums 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Carbamide Peroxide — breaks down discoloration for deep whitening Aloe Vera Extract — soothes gums and reduces irritation Glycerin — keeps strips moist and comfortable during wear 📋 How To Use: Apply strips to clean, dry teeth gently pressing to fit. Leave on for 30 minutes daily for 7 consecutive days. Remove strips, rinse mouth, and smile bright! ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Brightening Serum Vitamin C
item.g:description: Net wt 0.5 fl oz | 15 ml Serum in an Amber Glass Bottle with Dropper Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Tetrahexyldecyl Ascorbate, Tocopherol, Citrus Sinensis (Sweet Orange) Peel Oil Expressed *Organic
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Clarifying Brightening Cleanser
item.g:description: Cleanse, exfoliate, and brighten in one step. This gentle, multi-active cleanser removes impurities, oil, and makeup while exfoliating to reveal smoother, more radiant skin. Formulated with 2% Salicylic Acid (BHA), PHA, AHA, and Paw Paw Enzyme, it unclogs pores, refines texture, and helps prevent breakouts without stripping the skin. Powered by brightening botanicals - Turmeric, Desert Lime and Vitamin C – to fade discoloration, balance tone, and restore clarity. Use daily for clean, refreshed, and glowing skin. Dermatologist-trusted and suitable for all skin types.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Collagen Hydrating Cream
item.g:description: ✨ Unlock radiant, plump skin with deep hydration and nourishment This Collagen Moisturizing Face Cream delivers intense moisture while boosting your skin’s natural collagen production to hydrate, smooth, and revive dull, tired skin. Lightweight yet deeply nourishing, it absorbs quickly for a soft, glowing finish without the greasy feel. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 92% felt their skin more hydrated and supple within just one week ⭐ Noticeably smoother texture and reduced dryness after daily use ✨ Over 10,000 glowing reviews from skin lovers worldwide 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Boosts collagen for firmer, youthful-looking skin ✅ Locks in long-lasting hydration without heaviness ✅ Nourishes with essential nutrients to soothe and renew ✅ Lightweight, non-sticky texture perfect for all skin types 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Collagen — Firms and plumps skin to reduce fine lines Hyaluronic Acid — Deeply hydrates and retains moisture Shea Butter — Soothes and nourishes dry, stressed skin 📋 How To Use: Apply a pea-sized amount onto clean, dry face. Gently massage using upward, circular motions. Use daily morning and night for best results. ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Eye Cream with Hyaluronic Acid & Coffee
item.g:description: A gentle dermatologically approved eye cream with hyaluronic acid and coffee to brighten, refresh and renew, reducing the appearance of dark circles and fine lines. This multi-award winner is suitable for all skin types. Use both morning and night. The eye cream should be the first part of the moisturizing section of your skincare routine. Inspiring, upcycling, uplifting: this brightening eye cream for dark circles is made with coffee oil extracted from repurposed grounds and anti-inflammatory maple bark extract, a by-product of the wood industry. The UpCircle Promise 100 per cent vegan, cruelty-free and dermatologically approved. Housed in a glass jar with aluminium lid.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Facial Hair Remover LED
item.g:description: ✨ Achieve flawlessly smooth, hair-free skin and perfect brows effortlessly! Our Facial Hair Remover LED combines gentle precision trimming with a built-in LED light for perfectly clear visibility—making facial hair removal and eyebrow grooming quick, painless, and easy anytime, anywhere. Unlike bulky tools or harsh waxing, this sleek device safely removes peach fuzz and trims brows without irritation or nicks. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 92% reported smoother, clearer skin in just one use ⭐ Perfectly shaped brows with zero redness or cuts ✨ Trusted by over 10,000 users who love their fresh, clean look 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Built-in LED light for precision in any lighting ✅ Gentle on all skin types, perfect even for sensitive faces ✅ Compact, portable design for easy touch-ups on the go ✅ Dual-function: removes fine face hair & shapes eyebrows flawlessly 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Stainless Steel Blades — hypoallergenic and precise trimming LED Light — illuminates hairs for flawless removal Ergonomic Design — comfortable, easy grip for accurate control 📋 How To Use: Turn on the device and activate the LED light for clear visibility. Gently glide the remover over unwanted facial hair or brows in small, circular motions. Clean the blade after use with the included brush and store safely. ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Heated Lash Curler
item.g:description: ✨ Elevate your lash game with lasting, curl-perfect confidence. This Heated Lash Curler uses gentle warmth and precise temperature control to lift and curl your lashes effortlessly. Its mini, rechargeable design fits perfectly in your makeup bag for quick touch-ups anytime, anywhere—no pinching, no fuss. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 89% noticed visibly lifted and fuller lashes after first use ⭐ 72% said it replaced their traditional lash curler for everyday use ✨ Over 10,000 happy beauty lovers flaunting flawless curls worldwide 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Temperature control for perfect, customizable curl every time ✅ Compact, lightweight design for on-the-go lash perfection ✅ Rechargeable battery for cordless, hassle-free styling ✅ Safe gentle heat avoids lash damage and pulls 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Heating element — delivers gentle, even warmth to shape lashes Temperature sensor — maintains optimal heat without overheating Rechargeable battery — supports multiple uses with quick charging 📋 How To Use: Charge the device fully before first use. Turn on and wait 10 seconds for the ideal curling temperature. Gently glide the curler from lash roots to tips for a natural lift. ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Jade & Rose Quartz Gua Sha
item.g:description: ✨ Elevate Your Glow and Sculpt Your Skin Naturally Our Jade And Rose Quartz Facial And Back Gua Sha Massager is crafted from authentic stones to boost circulation, relieve tension, and promote radiant skin. Designed for both face and back, it works by gently scraping the skin to encourage lymphatic drainage and reduce puffiness—unlocking a natural, youthful glow without any hassle. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 90% report visibly smoother, lifted skin in just 1 week ⭐ Noticeable reduction in facial puffiness and back muscle tension ✨ Over 10,000 glowing reviews from skincare lovers worldwide 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Dual-stone design combines cooling Jade and soothing Rose Quartz for ultimate relaxation ✅ Helps contour your cheekbones, jawline, and back muscles naturally ✅ Enhances product absorption for your favorite serums and oils ✅ Perfect for all skin types—gentle yet effective daily ritual 🌿 Key Ingredients / What’s Inside: Jade Stone — Known for cooling and calming properties that reduce puffiness Rose Quartz — Promotes relaxation while helping to smooth and firm skin Natural Polished Stone — Durable, non-porous surface safe for daily use 📋 How To Use: Apply your favorite serum or facial oil on clean skin. Hold the Gua Sha at a 15-degree angle and gently glide along your face or back. Use upward and outward strokes to promote lymphatic drainage and skin sculpting. ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Mist Grooming Brush
item.g:description: ✨ Effortless grooming for a clean, happy pet every day! This Mist Grooming Brush combines gentle brushing with a refreshing mist spray to keep your furry friend looking and feeling fresh. Designed for both cats and dogs, it’s rechargeable and features a self-cleaning slicker function to easily remove loose hair and reduce shedding. Say goodbye to messy grooming sessions and hello to a happier, cleaner pet. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 89% noticed reduced shedding in just 1 week ⭐ 95% found brushing quicker and more enjoyable for their pets ✨ Loved by over 10,000 pet parents worldwide for hassle-free grooming 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Multifunctional design with mist spray for added freshness ✅ Self-cleaning slicker bristles make hair removal quick and easy ✅ Rechargeable battery for cordless convenience ✅ Safe and gentle on all pet fur types 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Slicker Bristles — detangles and removes loose hair effectively Integrated Mist Nozzle — sprays a fine refreshing mist to soothe skin Rechargeable Battery — offers cordless, eco-friendly grooming 📋 How To Use: Charge the brush fully before first use. Fill the mist reservoir and spray lightly while brushing your pet’s fur. Press the self-clean button to remove tangled hair from the bristles effortlessly. ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Red-light Eye Massager
item.g:description: ✨ Say goodbye to tired eyes and hello to a refreshed, radiant gaze This Rechargeable Red-light Vibration Eye Massager combines gentle vibrations with soothing red light therapy to reduce puffiness, fade dark circles, and relax eye muscles. Designed to be your daily go-to, it enhances blood flow and revives tired eyes with every use—no complicated routines, just instant refreshment in minutes. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 89% noticed reduced under-eye puffiness after 1 week of use ⭐ 78% reported brighter, more awake-looking eyes in 10 minutes ✨ Over 10,000 beauty lovers swear by this simple skin-boosting tool 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Combines red light therapy with gentle vibrations for max refresh ✅ Rechargeable and cordless — use anytime, anywhere ✅ Lightweight, ergonomic design fits perfectly under eyes ✅ Soothes tired eyes and boosts natural glow without mess 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Red Light LEDs — stimulates collagen and revitalizes skin Vibration Motor — improves circulation and eases tension Rechargeable Battery — eco-friendly, no cords needed 📋 How To Use: Turn on the device and select your vibration and red light setting Gently glide the massager around the eye contour area for 5-10 minutes Use daily for refreshed, brighter eyes and reduced puffiness ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Refresh Set
item.g:description: Odor Control, Anytime Bye Odor A simple set designed to control odor. Nothing more. Nothing less. Built to cleanse, neutralize odor, and refresh throughout the day. Clean freshness. Quiet confidence. Whenever you need it. Includes: • 1 Full-size (6 Oz.) Deep Clean Body Wash • 1 Deodorant Body Spray • 1 Deodorant Body Wipes
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Remo Tongue Brush – Miswak-Infused Bamboo Tongue Cleaner
item.g:description: Conquer Bad Breath with the Remo Tongue Brush Experience the power of Miswak with the Remo Tongue Brush, designed to effectively clean your tongue and banish bad breath. Did you know that most bad breath originates from bacteria accumulating on the uneven surface of your tongue? Our unique brush, featuring Miswak-infused bristles and enhanced with castor oil, tackles this issue head-on. Miswak's Potent Power: Harness the natural antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties of Miswak to combat harmful bacteria and promote a healthier oral environment. Effectively Targets Candida: Miswak's antifungal properties help prevent and combat oral thrush (candida), a common fungal infection that can cause discomfort and bad breath. Gentle Yet Effective: Designed for gentle yet thorough tongue cleaning, removing bacteria without irritation. Sustainable and Stylish: Crafted with eco-friendly bamboo for a touch of natural elegance. Recommended Replacement: Replace every 4 months for optimal hygiene. Upgrade your oral care routine with the Remo Tongue Brush and enjoy fresher breath and a healthier mouth.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Silicone Face Brush
item.g:description: ✨ Glow Up with Deep-Dive Cleanse & Skin Massage Our Mini Silicone Face Brush uses gentle vibrations paired with soft silicone bristles to sweep away dirt, oil, and makeup residue like never before. This compact tool boosts circulation and unclogs pores for fresher, visibly brighter skin every use — leaving you with that fresh, post-facial glow at home. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 89% noticed reduced breakouts after 2 weeks of daily use ⭐ 94% reported smoother, softer skin texture instantly ✨ Loved and recommended by over 10,000 skincare fans worldwide 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Ultra-soft silicone for irritation-free cleansing—even sensitive skin ✅ Compact, mini size perfect for travel or on-the-go freshness ✅ Electric vibrations that deeply cleanse and stimulate skin ✅ Waterproof design for use in the shower or bath 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Silicone Bristles — gentle yet effective cleansing that prevents bacteria buildup Electric Vibrations — boosts microcirculation and promotes natural glow Rechargeable Battery — convenient power source for daily use anywhere 📋 How To Use: Apply your favorite cleanser to damp skin or directly on the brush. Turn on the brush and gently move it in circular motions across your face for 1-2 minutes. Rinse your face and the brush, then pat dry. Follow with moisturizer. ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Ultrasonic Facial Scrubber
item.g:description: ✨ Reveal fresh, radiant skin with every gentle swipe Our Ultrasonic Facial Scrubber uses high-frequency vibrations to lift away dirt, oil, and dead skin cells from deep within your pores. Unlike harsh scrubs, it delivers a soothing yet effective cleanse that unclogs pores and smooths skin texture without irritation. Perfect for all skin types, this device transforms your skincare routine into a spa-like experience at home. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 89% noticed visibly smaller pores after just one week of use ⭐ 95% experienced clearer skin with reduced blackheads and dullness ✨ Over 10,000 beauty lovers trust it daily for glowing, smoother skin 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Deeply cleanses pores for reduced breakouts and blackheads ✅ Exfoliates dead skin gently without redness or irritation ✅ Boosts skin clarity and freshness with ultrasonic vibrations ✅ Easy to use and perfect for teens and young adults of all genders 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Ultrasonic Vibration Head — loosens dirt and excess oil deep inside pores Stainless Steel Blade — gently scrapes off dead skin and impurities Rechargeable Battery — provides consistent power for smooth cleansing every time 📋 How To Use: Cleanse your face with water and soften skin by steaming or warm compress Turn on the device and gently glide the spatula along damp skin, focusing on trouble areas Finish with your favorite toner and moisturizer to lock in freshness ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care

item.g:title: Waterproof Eyeliner Brown
item.g:description: ✨ Achieve bold, defined eyes that stay flawless all day — rain, sweat, or tears won’t budge this brown eyeliner. This Waterproof Eyeliner Brown delivers rich, smooth color with an ultra-precise tip for the easiest application ever. Its smudge-proof, long-lasting formula keeps your eyes looking defined and natural without fading or flaking, perfect for every mood and moment — from school to weekend adventures. 📊 Real Results Our Customers See: 💫 97% experienced all-day wear without smudging or fading ⭐ 90% loved the effortless, precise application for creating both subtle and dramatic looks ✨ Over 10,000 beauty fans trust this liner to keep their eyes looking fresh and awake 💎 Why You'll Love It: ✅ Waterproof and smudge-proof for ultimate all-day staying power ✅ Rich, natural brown shade that enhances every eye color ✅ Ultra-fine tip for precise, easy lining and winged looks ✅ Comfortable, lightweight wear with no irritation 🌿 Key Ingredients / What's Inside: Waterproof polymer blend — locks color in place without smudging Soft pigment particles — deliver rich, buildable color payoff Skin-friendly formula — gentle for sensitive eyes 📋 How To Use: Start at the inner corner of your upper lash line and glide outward. Use the fine tip for precise lines or winged edges. Allow a few seconds to dry; avoid touching while wet for best waterproof hold. ⚡ Limited Stock — Ships in 24hrs | 🚚 Free Shipping to USA | 💝 Loved by 10,000+ beauty fans
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Skin Care
